title: CPAP Order Status — Excellent Handling
scenario: Customer calls to check on their delayed CPAP authorization. Agent handles the call with empathy, clear explanations, and proactive follow-up.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you for calling UMS, my name is Alex. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hi, I'm calling about my CPAP order. It's been three weeks and I haven't heard anything.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear it's been delayed. Let me pull up your account right now. Can you verify your date of birth for me?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. I can see your order here — we're waiting on the prior authorization from your insurance. I'll call them right now while you're on the line. Do you mind if I put you on a brief hold?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for holding. Good news — the authorization is approved. Your CPAP will ship tomorrow and you should have it within three to five business days. I'll send you a tracking email today.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Oh wonderful, thank you so much for looking into this right away.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course. Is there anything else I can help you with?
